title: Volume 1
overview: Leading an ordinary and unexciting life, Shinta is a student at an elite university in Tokyo. One day he meets Lilith, a beautiful and mysterious girl from Romania who has just transferred to the school. This strange encounter changes Shinta’s life forever as Lilith makes an odd request of him.

title: Volume 2
overview: Shinta discovers that he is the last in a long line of vampire slayers and Lilith, a vampire, must conceive a child with the slayer and then kill them both and bathe in their blood in order to live on.
